body.title: One daemon structure (Ground Loop) — collapse standalone granny/scraps daemons; no device runs its own __main__ loop
body.description:
**HARD RULE (Akien 2026-07-08):** The Ground Loop exists so there is exactly ONE daemon structure. No other daemons. PERIOD. Today three devices each run their OWN standalone daemon — a `if __name__ == "__main__"` + `while True` run_loop: unseen_university/devices/granny/daemon.py, unseen_university/devices/scraps/daemon.py, and unseen_university/devices/ground_loop/daemon.py. Granny and Scraps are VIOLATIONS.

**Proposed shape:** Granny's and Scraps's periodic work becomes a shim-started component/thread driven by the SINGLE Ground Loop structure (per the bus model: poll loops run in a background thread started by shim.start(), not a standalone process). Remove the standalone `__main__`/run_loop from granny and scraps; their loop bodies (e.g. granny's run_once) become ticks the ground-loop/shim drives. The Ground Loop stays PASSIVE (heartbeat + startup-error->rescue; the shim owns startup — feedback_ground_loop_is_passive_shim_owns_startup).

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/granny/daemon.py (drop __main__/run_loop; run_once -> driven tick), unseen_university/devices/scraps/daemon.py (same), the shims, ground_loop structure.

**SUPERSEDES a transitional bridge:** T-granny-dispatch-observability-gap added `configure_process_logging` (diagnostic_base/base.py) + kept granny's `__main__` logging setup ONLY because granny is a standalone process today. Once collapsed under the Ground Loop (a DiagnosticBase device), granny inherits the canonical JSON sink naturally. This ticket REMOVES configure_process_logging + the daemons' `__main__` blocks (check whether scraps/ground_loop still need the helper before deleting). Also RELOCATE granny's dispatch-health emit (run_loop `_emit_dispatch_health`, T-granny-dispatch-observability-gap) into the driven tick so the health WARN survives the collapse.

**Design rules:** device.py/shim.py are the design center; cooperative-not-hierarchical; ground loop passive; add the hard rule to CLAUDE.md structural rules.

**Scope boundary:** collapse the daemon STRUCTURE only — do NOT change dispatch/scrap LOGIC (run_once decisions, scrap behavior stay identical).

**Test plan:** granny's run_once/dispatch behavior unchanged (existing granny tests still pass once run under the new driver); grep shows NO device daemon retains a standalone `__main__` run_loop; the Ground Loop drives granny's + scraps's tick; the dispatch-health WARN still fires from the driven path.

**Completion criteria:** zero standalone device daemons remain (only the Ground Loop has a daemon structure); granny + scraps run as shim/ground-loop-driven components; CLAUDE.md records the one-daemon hard rule; dispatch-health emit preserved.

**Intention:** I intend that the Ground Loop is the sole daemon structure and every device's periodic work runs under it, so lifecycle management is uniform and no device hand-rolls its own process loop.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result:
Collapsed granny+scraps standalone daemons onto shim-owned in-process loop threads. No device runs its own __main__+while-True daemon; only the Ground Loop is a daemon. New unseen_university.shim.ShimLoopThread is the ONE loop primitive; GrannyShim owns a demand-started dispatch loop (watchdog spots pending sprint tickets off the queue), ScrapsShim owns the job-runner loop; both brought up via `python -m unseen_university.devices.<granny|scraps>` (aider pattern). Retired config/ground_loop/scraps.yaml; CLAUDE.md updated.

KEY FINDING (the validation failure Akien flagged): GrannyShim/ScrapsShim were NEVER instantiated in any live process (only tests) — the shim-owns-startup model was dead code. Now wired into GrannyWeatherwaxDevice/ScrapsDevice.__init__.

PROVEN via proof_emitter (authentic red=AssertionError -> green, stub-first commits d5a2a4ef->3925debf):
- test_loop_thread_logs_land_with_device_id (loop-thread logs reach the per-device JSON sink via contextualize)
- test_dispatch_health_fires_from_driven_path (dispatch-health WARN survives on the driven on_cycle path)

DELIBERATE DEVIATIONS: (a) KEPT configure_process_logging in base.py (ticket said REMOVE) — correct tested helper the ground_loop standalone daemon should adopt; follow-up ticket to file. (b) KEPT ./granny as launcher (repointed to python -m ...granny) — something must launch the shim-owning process, like python -m aider.
